## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing patterns and conventions
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint` in `server/` and `client/`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npm run build` in `client/`)
- [ ] New env vars documented in `.env.example` files
- [ ] Database changes have a generated migration (`npm run migration:generate`)
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing behaviour changed
